title: Thai Basil Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic Thai-inspired dish made with grassy tagine, chewy meat, and fresh basil. Serve over rice for a delicious and satisfying meal.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chewy meat and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the chopped grassy tagine, coconut milk, fish sauce, and brown sugar. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 10-15 minutes or until the meat is tender.
Stir in the chopped fresh Thai basil and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the Thai basil tagine over rice and enjoy!
